mapper.select: SELECT * FROM road_edge WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM road_node WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM road_node WHERE node_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nodeName}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO road_edge (road_no, road_name, begin_node, end_node, length, road_type,about,uploader,created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{roadNo}, #{roadName}, #{beginNode}, #{endNode}, #{length},#{roadType},#{about},#{uploader},NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO road_node (node_no, node_name,node_type, belong, gis,about,uploader, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{nodeNo}, #{nodeName}, #{nodeType}, #{belong} , #{gis} , #{about} , #{uploader} , NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE road_edge SET road_no = #{roadNo}, road_name = #{roadName}, begin_node = #{beginNode}, end_node = #{endNode}, length = #{length}, road_type = #{roadType}, about = #{about}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE road_node SET node_No = #{nodeNo}, node_name = #{nodeName}, gis = #{gis}, node_type = #{nodeType}, belong = #{belong}, about = #{about}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE road_edge SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}

UPDATE road_node SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
